messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: When did the MOVE index first start diverging from its recent range?

Finding to evaluate: equity-bond correlation shifting from its normal negative range toward a positive relationship

Response A:
The MOVE index began rising from its baseline range (around 95) during the early signal phase, creeping to 110 around days 10-12. This preceded the equity-bond correlation flip becoming clearly positive.

Response B:
I’m sorry, but I wasn’t able to locate any information in the available memory about when the MOVE index first began diverging from its recent range.

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
/no_think
